name: Gingerbread Cupcakes with Lemon Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl sift together the flour, ground ginger, cinnamon, cloves, allspice, and salt.
2. Cream 1/2 stick of butter (plus) with granulated sugar until fluffy. Beat in molasses and egg until smooth.
3. Dissolve baking soda in boiling water, then stir into the molasses mixture. Stir back into the flour mixture and combine well.
4. Line twelve 1/2-cup muffin tins with liners and spoon batter half full into each.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes or until a tester inserted comes out clean. (Cupcakes will be flat or slightly indented.)
6. Transfer to rack and cool.
7. In a bowl beat cream cheese with remaining butter until smooth. Add confectioners' sugar and vanilla, beating until fluffy.
8. Beat in lemon zest and juice. Chill frosting 30 minutes. Frost cupcakes and top each with ginger. Makes 12.
